---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Kainex
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary / 概述

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation / 动机

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

为什么需要这个功能？它解决了什么问题？

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe the solution you'd like. Include API designs, UI mockups, or pseudocode if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered / 备选方案

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Affected Component / 涉及组件

- [ ] Engine (backtest, strategies, paper trading, risk)
- [ ] Collector (data sources, storage)
- [ ] Frontend (dashboard, charts, UI)
- [ ] API (REST endpoints, WebSocket)
- [ ] New strategy
- [ ] New data source
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, CI)
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request.
